pr.title: Record: Fused MLP (Triton+CUTLASS EVT) + Fast Causal N-Gram Tilt & Subword Certainty— 1.1052 BPB (3-seed mean)

output.summary: Fuses Triton TMA forward and CUTLASS EVT backward MLP kernels, widens MLP + Hessian-guided mixed int5/int6 quant, and adds fast n-gram tilt memory.
techniques: Fused Triton TMA forward + CUTLASS EVT backward MLP kernels with precomputed activation gradients
Hessian-ranked mixed int5/int6 quantization to fit a 3.5× MLP within 16MB
Sparse causal n-gram tilt acting as auxiliary memory with GPU tilt
